primary_accounting_issue: Qualification d’un bail comme contrat de courte durée au sens d’IFRS 16 lorsque la durée initiale est inférieure ou égale à un an mais que le bail peut se renouveler automatiquement, ce qui dépend de la détermination de la lease term et de la période exécutoire.

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the strict precedence rule by selecting IFRS 16 because it is the IFRS standard that directly governs lease term determination and the short-term lease exemption; no other candidate document provides an overlapping governing model for this eligibility question.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: low — IFRS 16 directly addresses both short-term lease treatment and lease term/enforceability, which are the core elements of the question.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern the short-term lease exemption and the determination of lease term and enforceability needed to assess that exemption.

supporting_authority.reason: These agenda decisions clarify how cancellable or renewable leases and leasehold-improvement economics affect the enforceable period and lease term assessment.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs address depreciation and useful life of property, plant and equipment, which are related to leasehold improvements but do not identify the peer approaches for short-term lease classification.

These paragraphs concern scope, identified asset, lease definition, sale-and-leaseback, and variable payment mechanics, which are not needed to identify the top-level approaches for the short-term lease issue.

treatment_families.family: Short-term lease exemption based on lease term not exceeding twelve months
General lessee accounting when the lease term extends beyond the short-term threshold

approaches.label: Short-term lease exemption
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 16 provides a distinct lessee election not to apply the normal recognition model to leases that qualify as short-term based on the determined lease term.

approaches.label: General lessee lease accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: If the lease term determined under IFRS 16 extends beyond the short-term threshold, the lease falls into the standard lessee accounting model rather than the exemption.
